title: Rajasthan BSTC 2026 Answer Key Out

detail.title: Rajasthan BSTC 2026 Answer Key Out
detail.short_info: BSTC 2026 Answer Key is out for Shift 1 and Shift 2 (Set A, B, C, D). Download official Rajasthan Pre D.El.Ed answer key PDF from predeledraj2026.com and check your score.

content.text: The Rajasthan Pre D.El.Ed (BSTC) 2026 entrance exam is conducted for admission to the two‑year Diploma in Elementary Education programme in government and private teacher training institutes across the state. The authorities have released the provisional BSTC 2026 answer key so that candidates can check their responses and calculate their probable scores before the result is announced.
Direct Link to Download BSTC 2026 Answer Key Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download BSTC 2026 Answer Key Here

rows: Set A, Set B, Set C, Set D

sections.heading: BSTC 2026 Answer Key Download Link (Shift 1 & Shift 2)

content.text: Candidates who appeared in the Rajasthan BSTC 2026 exam can download the answer key directly from the official Pre D.El.Ed portal. The authorities have provided separate PDFs for each shift and question paper set so that students can verify their answers accurately.
Official website for BSTC answer key 2026
The official answer key is hosted on the Rajasthan Pre D.El.Ed examination website. Candidates should use only the official portals to avoid relying on unofficial or incorrect solutions.
Official portals:

items: predeledraj2026.com
predeledraj2026.in

content.text: Once on the homepage, candidates need to access the latest notification or “Answer Key / Question Paper” section to find the BSTC 2026 answer key link.
BSTC 2026 answer key PDF download options (Set A, B, C, D)
The answer key PDFs are generally provided in a shift‑wise and set‑wise format, such as:

items: BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 1, Set A - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 1, Set B - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 1, Set C - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 1, Set D - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 2, Set A - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 2, Set B - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 2, Set C - Click Here
BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Shift 2, Set D - Click Here

content.text: On your portal, you can provide these as labelled download buttons or a table with clear shift and set labels, along with a highlighted “Direct Answer Key Link” pointing to the official keyNpaper URL.

sections.heading: How to Download BSTC 2026 Answer Key from predeledraj2026.com

content.text: Step‑by‑step process to download answer key
To help users quickly find the answer key, present the steps in a simple, numbered format:

items: Open your browser and visit the official Rajasthan Pre D.El.Ed website - predeledraj2026.com or predeledraj2026.in.
On the homepage, look for the “Latest Announcements”, “Notifications”, or “Answer Key” section.
Click on the link titled “BSTC 2026 Answer Key and Question Paper Booklet” or similar.
A new page will appear displaying answer key links for Shift 1 and Shift 2.
Choose your exam shift (Shift 1 or Shift 2).
Next, select the PDF corresponding to your question paper set (Set A, B, C, or D).
The BSTC 2026 answer key PDF will open on the screen; click on the download icon to save it or print it for future reference.

content.text: How to check your responses with the answer key

items: Keep your BSTC 2026 question paper or OMR sheet handy.
Open the downloaded answer key for the exact shift and set you attempted.
Compare the option you marked for each question with the correct option given in the answer key.
For every correct answer, award yourself the prescribed marks (for example, 3 marks per correct answer if that is the notified scheme).
Since there is usually no negative marking in BSTC, do not deduct marks for wrong answers unless officially specified.
Add up your marks across all sections to get your estimated score.
Use this estimated score to understand your chances of qualifying once official cut‑offs are released.

content.text: BSTC 2026 exam schedule and shifts

The Rajasthan BSTC 2026 examination was conducted on a single day in two different shifts to accommodate a large number of candidates across multiple exam centres. Candidates were allotted either the morning (Shift 1) or afternoon (Shift 2) session, and each session followed the same exam pattern and marking scheme.
Question paper pattern and marking scheme
The BSTC 2026 question paper is designed to test candidates’ aptitude for teacher training courses. The paper typically consists of sections such as:

items: Mental Ability
General Knowledge of Rajasthan
Teaching Aptitude
English
Hindi or Sanskrit (language‑specific section)

content.text: Key features of the pattern:

items: Total questions: 200
Total marks: 600 (if each question carries 3 marks)
Question type: Multiple‑choice questions (MCQs)
Mode: Offline OMR‑based exam
Negative marking: Generally not applicable, unless specified in the notification

content.text: Candidates should always cross‑check the exact pattern and marking rules mentioned in the official BSTC 2026 information brochure or exam instructions.

sections.heading: Raising Objections on Rajasthan BSTC Answer Key 2026

content.text: Objection process and important dates

After releasing the provisional answer key, the exam authority usually provides a specific window during which candidates can submit objections against any answer they consider incorrect. This process ensures transparency and gives candidates a fair opportunity to highlight any discrepancies.
Common steps for raising objections:

items: Visit the official Pre D.El.Ed website and log in with your application number and password or date of birth.
Click on the “Provisional Answer Key Objection” or “Grievance” link.
Select the question number for which you want to raise an objection.
Choose the answer option you believe is correct and provide a valid justification.
Upload supporting documents or reference material, if required.
Pay the prescribed objection fee per question, if applicable.
Submit the form before the last date mentioned in the official notification.

content.text: Candidates should carefully read the instructions on the portal, as objections filed without proper proof or within the wrong format may be rejected.

sections.heading: Final answer key and result announcement

content.text: Once the objection window closes, the exam authority reviews all submitted objections with subject experts. If any mistake is found in the provisional answer key, corrections are made and a final answer key is released. The result of BSTC 2026 is then prepared based on this final answer key, and no further challenges are usually allowed.

The BSTC 2026 result will be published in online mode, and candidates will be able to check their marks, rank, and qualifying status using their login details. After the result, the counselling schedule and seat allocation process for D.El.Ed institutes will be notified separately.

sections.heading: BSTC 2026 Answer Key - Important Instructions for Candidates

content.text: To help candidates avoid common mistakes while using the answer key, you can highlight a few key points:

items: Always confirm that you are checking the correct shift and set; using the wrong PDF will give misleading scores.
Use only the official answer key from the Pre D.El.Ed portal; unofficial keys from coaching centres may not be accurate.
Treat your calculated marks as provisional; your final marks will be based on the final answer key and official evaluation.
Keep your admit card, OMR sheet details, and downloaded answer key safely until the entire admission process is over.
Follow all official notifications for objection dates, result announcement, and counselling schedule instead of relying solely on social media or rumours.
